description:
Customer-facing CLI for Great Clips salons. Joins the customer-facing
GreatClips webservices (salon metadata, profile, hours, geocoding) with
the third-party ICS Net Check-In service that powers wait times and
check-in submission (the "Powered by ICS" footer on the official site).

Both host families share one Auth0 Bearer token, captured once via
`auth login --chrome` from a logged-in browser session.

tools.name: cancel_submit
tools.description: Cancel the active check-in for this account. Returns the new CancelResult.

tools.name: checkin_submit
tools.description: Add yourself and optionally other party members to a salon waitlist. Required: firstName, lastName, phoneNumber, salonNumber. Optional: guests (default: 1). Returns the new CheckInResult.

params.name: firstName
params.description: Your first name (will appear on the in-salon waitlist)

params.name: phoneNumber
params.description: Phone number for ReadyNext text alerts

params.name: guests
params.description: Total number of haircuts (1-5; you + any additional party members)

tools.name: customer_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated customer's profile. Returns the Profile.

tools.name: geo_postal_code
tools.description: Resolve a zip/postal code to lat/lng/city/state. Required: query. Optional: limit (default: 20). Returns array of GeoResult.

tools.name: hours_upcoming
tools.description: Get 14-day hours forecast for one salon. Required: salon. Returns array of SalonHours.

tools.name: salons_get
tools.description: Get a single salon by its salon number. Required: num. Optional: limit (default: 1). Returns the new Salon.

params.name: num
params.description: Salon number (e.g. 8991 for Island Square on Mercer Island)

tools.name: salons_search
tools.description: Search salons by zip code, city, or coordinates within a radius. Required: term. Optional: radius (default: 25), limit (default: 50), lat (default: 0) (plus 1 more). Returns array of Salon.

params.name: term
params.description: Zip code, city, or address term

tools.name: status_get
tools.description: Get your active check-in status (position in line, estimated wait). Returns the CheckInStatus.

tools.name: wait_one
tools.description: Get wait time for one salon (body is a single-element array of {storeNumber}). Required: storeNumber. Returns array of WaitTime.
